data.title: Eric Trump Sues Capital One Over Unjust Debanking of 300 Accounts
data.description:
Eric Trump has taken legal action against Capital One for closing over 300 Trump Organization accounts. The lawsuit alleges that the bank’s decision was politically motivated and caused significant financial harm. This case emerges as Trump’s crypto reserve plans gain attention, adding another layer to the ongoing debate over financial freedom. Trump Organization Accuses Capital […]
The post...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/08/eric-trump-sues-capital-one-over-unjust-debanking-of-300-accounts/

data.title: Why OCC’s Crypto Rule Change is a Game Changer for XRP, Ethereum, Bitcoin
data.description:
In a major development for the crypto industry, the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has granted U.S. banks the authority to store crypto assets, engage in stablecoin operations and process payment transactions using distributed ledger technology (DLT). This regulatory shift, announced on Friday, paves the way for a surge in institutional […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/why-occs-crypto-rule-change-is-a-game-changer-for-xrp-ethereum-bitcoin/

data.title: BlackRock And Grayscale Urged to Consider A Shiba Inu (SHIB) ETF For These Reasons
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Transfers Large Amount of BTC from Mt. Gox Wallet to Cold Storage
data.description:
The move comes as Mt. Gox continues to compensate victims of the 2011 exchange hack.

data.title: Argentine Prosecutor Investigates President Milei and the LIBRA Scandal
data.description:
Eduardo Taiano, Argentine Federal prosecutor, is investigating the $LIBRA scandal, focusing on President Javier Milei and other people associated with the token. During the scandal, around $110 million was accumulated. Authorities seek international assistance to track down the transactions and freeze the assets. Taiano’s strategy includes blacklisting digital addresses to slow down the...
source: https://zycrypto.com/argentine-prosecutor-investigates-president-milei-and-the-libra-scandal/

data.title: Tucker Interviews FTX’s SBF in Prison, Discusses “Dystopian” Life Behind Bars
data.description:
In his recent prison interview with Tucker Carlson, Sam Bankman Fried maintained his innocence and expressed confusion as to why he was convicted of fraud. He argued that FTX was a legitimate service, and although there was a crisis, the company was still solvent.  Bankman spoke candidly about his prison experience and shared his thoughts […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/tucker-interviews-ftxs-sbf-in-prison-discusses-dystopian-life-behind-bars/

data.title: Coinbase Acquires Blockchain Startup’s Team To Enhance Privacy Efforts on the Base Network
data.description:
The top US-based crypto exchange platform Coinbase is acquiring a blockchain startup’s team to bolster its privacy efforts on Base. In a new announcement, Coinbase says it is onboarding the development team of layer-1 project Iron Fish (IRON) to help develop “privacy-preserving primitives” on Base, the crypto exchange’s proprietary blockchain. Coinbase highlights that it is not […]
The post...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/08/coinbase-acquires-blockchain-startups-team-to-enhance-privacy-efforts-on-the-base-network/

data.title: Bank of America Warns Social Security Numbers, IDs and Other Sensitive Customer Data Potentially Exposed in Third-Party Document Destruction Blunder
data.description:
Bank of America is warning a small group of customers about a new data breach that could potentially expose confidential and sensitive information. In a filing with the Massachusetts state government, the bank says a provider of document destruction services inappropriately handled confidential documents belonging to customers on December 30th. The bank has not declared […]
The post Bank of...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/08/bank-of-america-warns-social-security-numbers-ids-and-other-sensitive-customer-data-potentially-exposed-in-third-party-document-destruction-blunder/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 86,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.65% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 08, 2025, 17:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 86,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 86,027.742188 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.65% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,200 USDT with a 3.13% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 08, 2025, 17:19 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,200 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,212.040039 USDT, with a narrowed 3.13% increase in 24 hours.
